title: Advancements in perovskites for solar cell commercialization: A review
source: Raju et al., Advanced Powder Materials, 2025

L2: Perovskite solar cells have achieved efficiencies exceeding 26% for single-junction devices
Stability and scalability remain key challenges for perovskite solar cell commercialization
L3: Comprehensive review of perovskite solar cell technology covering materials advances, efficiency records exceeding 26% single-junction and 34% tandem, stability challenges from phase instability and environmental degradation, and pathways toward commercial viability
